page_title: This is the dream, beyond belief...
text:
is a song from Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon A Time. It is track 5 in the album Music from "Shin Evangelion": Evangelion: 3.0+1.0, disc 2. https://vgmdb.net/album/107287 It is a shorter version of the song "this is the dream" from the same album.

Lyrics

 
Now we look to the future
To bright new horizons
With hopes riding high
On a wave of excitement
For everyone, this is the dream
